chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1349 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Humayoon Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Both the Counsels have submitted that the controversy has been resolved by Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan on 10th July 2025 in civil appeal No.1509 of 2021 and other connected cases. After such decision of the Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan, several petitions have been decided vide order dated 24.09.2025, copy of such order has also been placed on record. The counsel for the PTCL undertakes that case of petitioner will be process in light of Judgment of Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan, within ninety days, from the date of this order. On such counsel for petitioner seeks disposal of instant petitions, hence the instant petition is hereby disposed of, with directions to the respondents to made compliance in the light of judgment of Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan and such compliance report shall be submitted through Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
